chart.title: Solar power generation
chart.subtitle: Electricity generation from solar, measured in [terawatt-hours](#dod:watt-hours).
chart.citation: Ember (2026); Energy Institute - Statistical Review of World Energy (2025)

Electricity from solar - TWh.descriptionProcessing: - Electricity data from 2000 onwards (and from 1990 onwards for European countries, including Turkey) comes from Ember. Earlier data comes from the Energy Institute.
Electricity from solar - TWh.citationShort: Ember (2026); Energy Institute - Statistical Review of World Energy (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data
